NSE Indices Limited is the largest Index provider of India

Managing the largest number of Indian indices under the Nifty brand, 201 Passive Funds (ETFs and Index Funds) tracking Nifty indices in India and 13 Passive Funds (ETFs and index Funds) tracking Nifty indices in other global markets.

Nifty based derivative products are traded in exchanges like NSE and NSE International Exchange IFSC Limited (NSE IX).
